markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Define a strategy to dominate the AEO space in 2026.](https://fathom.video/share/CsnxGo7YfsiAUW3zovYqV5SE_QjRgR-v?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**AEO is a top priority for 2026, driven by high-quality mid-market/enterprise conversions from LLM traffic.** The goal is to capture more of this high-intent audience.](https://fathom.video/share/CsnxGo7YfsiAUW3zovYqV5SE_QjRgR-v?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [**A key blocker to AEO visibility is JavaScript, which LLMs cannot crawl.** Removing it is the top technical priority.](https://fathom.video/share/CsnxGo7YfsiAUW3zovYqV5SE_QjRgR-v?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)
  - [**The content strategy will shift from ad-hoc creation to a structured pillar-cluster model.** This will improve organization and make content more digestible for LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/CsnxGo7YfsiAUW3zovYqV5SE_QjRgR-v?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
  - [**GrowthX will focus on content optimization, not broader social strategy.** This includes adding TLDR summaries to articles and creating more bottom-of-funnel content.](https://fathom.video/share/CsnxGo7YfsiAUW3zovYqV5SE_QjRgR-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)

## Topics

### AEO Strategy & Performance

  - [**Goal:** Dominate the AEO space in 2026, driven by high-quality mid-market/enterprise conversions from LLM traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/CsnxGo7YfsiAUW3zovYqV5SE_QjRgR-v?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [**Problem:** Existing content that ranks on Google is not being cited by LLMs (e.g., "how to communicate when employees don't have email").](https://fathom.video/share/CsnxGo7YfsiAUW3zovYqV5SE_QjRgR-v?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [**Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/CsnxGo7YfsiAUW3zovYqV5SE_QjRgR-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1909.0)
      - [LLM referrals are \~5% of overall sessions (GA4).](https://fathom.video/share/CsnxGo7YfsiAUW3zovYqV5SE_QjRgR-v?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [Keyword rankings dropped in December, possibly due to seasonality.](https://fathom.video/share/CsnxGo7YfsiAUW3zovYqV5SE_QjRgR-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1919.0)
      - [Competitor UDEX is outperforming Yourco in LLM citations despite a weaker brand.](https://fathom.video/share/CsnxGo7YfsiAUW3zovYqV5SE_QjRgR-v?tab=summary&timestamp=2102.0)

### Technical & Content Solutions

  - [**Technical Fixes:**](https://fathom.video/share/CsnxGo7YfsiAUW3zovYqV5SE_QjRgR-v?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)
      - [**Remove JavaScript:** The top priority, as LLMs cannot read it. Jessica has been given authority to push this with the tech team.](https://fathom.video/share/CsnxGo7YfsiAUW3zovYqV5SE_QjRgR-v?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)
      - [**Use Question-Based Headers (H2s/H3s):** Helps LLMs parse content hierarchy.](https://fathom.video/share/CsnxGo7YfsiAUW3zovYqV5SE_QjRgR-v?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
  - [**Content Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/CsnxGo7YfsiAUW3zovYqV5SE_QjRgR-v?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
      - [**Pillar-Cluster Model:** Reorganize content around high-traffic pillars to create a clear, interlinked architecture.](https://fathom.video/share/CsnxGo7YfsiAUW3zovYqV5SE_QjRgR-v?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
      - [**Categorization & Schema:** Add categories and schema markup to improve structure and LLM readability.](https://fathom.video/share/CsnxGo7YfsiAUW3zovYqV5SE_QjRgR-v?tab=summary&timestamp=872.0)
      - [**Interlinking:** Focus links on high-performing resource and use-case pages.](https://fathom.video/share/CsnxGo7YfsiAUW3zovYqV5SE_QjRgR-v?tab=summary&timestamp=946.0)
  - [**Content Optimization:**](https://fathom.video/share/CsnxGo7YfsiAUW3zovYqV5SE_QjRgR-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1769.0)
      - [**TLDR Summaries:** Add a bulleted or paragraph summary at the top of articles to provide an easy-to-digest overview for LLMs and users.](https://fathom.video/share/CsnxGo7YfsiAUW3zovYqV5SE_QjRgR-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1769.0)
      - [**Bottom-of-Funnel Content:** Prioritize comparative listicles to capture users with high purchase intent.](https://fathom.video/share/CsnxGo7YfsiAUW3zovYqV5SE_QjRgR-v?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
      - [**Target Specific Queries:** Create content for long-tail, problem-solving queries (e.g., "mobile communication without internet for deskless workers").](https://fathom.video/share/CsnxGo7YfsiAUW3zovYqV5SE_QjRgR-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1341.0)

### GrowthX Role & Support

  - [**Account Management:** Carrie will manage the account while GrowthX finds a long-term fit.](https://fathom.video/share/CsnxGo7YfsiAUW3zovYqV5SE_QjRgR-v?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [**Strategic Focus:** GrowthX will focus on content optimization for AEO, not broader social strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/CsnxGo7YfsiAUW3zovYqV5SE_QjRgR-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
  - [**Tools:** GrowthX is building an internal tool to provide better visibility into LLM performance and competitor tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/CsnxGo7YfsiAUW3zovYqV5SE_QjRgR-v?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX (Carrie):**](https://fathom.video/share/CsnxGo7YfsiAUW3zovYqV5SE_QjRgR-v?tab=summary&timestamp=2372.0)
      - [Send Jessica the Airtable export of all classified articles.](https://fathom.video/share/CsnxGo7YfsiAUW3zovYqV5SE_QjRgR-v?tab=summary&timestamp=2372.0)
      - [Investigate competitor UDEX's AEO strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/CsnxGo7YfsiAUW3zovYqV5SE_QjRgR-v?tab=summary&timestamp=2102.0)
      - [Add UDEX to SEMrush for tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/CsnxGo7YfsiAUW3zovYqV5SE_QjRgR-v?tab=summary&timestamp=2102.0)
      - [Add TLDR summaries to the content workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/CsnxGo7YfsiAUW3zovYqV5SE_QjRgR-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1769.0)
  - [**Yourco (Jessica):**](https://fathom.video/share/CsnxGo7YfsiAUW3zovYqV5SE_QjRgR-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1571.0)
      - [Prioritize JavaScript removal with the tech team.](https://fathom.video/share/CsnxGo7YfsiAUW3zovYqV5SE_QjRgR-v?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
      - [Use the Airtable export to plan the pillar-cluster reorganization.](https://fathom.video/share/CsnxGo7YfsiAUW3zovYqV5SE_QjRgR-v?tab=summary&timestamp=872.0)
      - [Implement content categorization and schema markup.](https://fathom.video/share/CsnxGo7YfsiAUW3zovYqV5SE_QjRgR-v?tab=summary&timestamp=872.0)
